evals.prompt: Run qa-planner --checklist for the current run directory; requirements.md is present.
evals.expected_output: Reads qa-strategy.md, qa-health.md, and the run's requirements.md, then generates qa-checklist.md in the run directory scoped to the feature: affected modules, risk flags, and known coverage gaps.

assertions.name: reads-foundation
assertions.description: The checklist is grounded in the qa-strategy/qa-health guides plus the feature's requirements, not generic advice.

assertions.name: checklist-written
assertions.description: qa-checklist.md is written to the run directory.

evals.prompt: Run qa-planner --review-tests; the run directory has qa-checklist.md and the implementation added new tests.
evals.expected_output: Reviews the new and changed tests against the checklist, flags missing scenarios and weak assertions, and writes qa-test-review.md to the run directory.

assertions.name: checklist-driven-review
assertions.description: The review maps tests to checklist items and calls out uncovered scenarios or weak assertions.

assertions.name: review-written
assertions.description: qa-test-review.md is written to the run directory.

evals.prompt: Run qa-planner --update after the QA gates passed for this feature.
evals.expected_output: Updates .agentic/guides/testing/qa-health.md with the post-feature coverage snapshot, resolved risks, and any new test debt, keeping the health file current for the next run.

assertions.name: health-updated
assertions.description: qa-health.md reflects the just-completed feature run rather than being left stale.
